title: Query did not produce a result set
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), category VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 100.00, 'A'), (2, 200.50, 'B'), (3, NULL, 'A');
SELECT category AS cat, COUNT(id) AS count_id, AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM test_table GROUP BY category;
SELECT category AS cat, SUM(value) AS total_value, (SUM(value) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table)) AS avg_per_category FROM test_table GROUP BY category;

SELECT category AS cat, SUM(value) AS total_value, (2 * (SUM(value) / CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) END)) AS adjusted_value FROM test_table GROUP BY category;
key_bug_features: Incorrect aggregation in grouped query with alias
